entries.title: On Memory
entries.preview:
# On Memory

> Memories are like travelers, you never know when they will show up. But you must always be ready anyway.

Two fragments arrived in the same breath. The first speaks of memory as a visitor — uninvited, unscheduled, and yet expected. The readiness it asks of us is not vigilance. It is the readiness of an o…

fragments.text: Memories are like travelers, you never know when they will show up. But you must always be ready anyway.
Life is moving. You are still. Why not simply allow them into your net — for surely they will succeed.
